name: Hot Chocolate
recipeIngredient: A splash of brandy or butterscotch schnapps (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the evaporated skimmed milk into a microwave-safe container. If desired, mix it with an equal amount of skimmed milk.
2. Microwave for 20-30 seconds until hot and fragrant. Do not boil.
3. In a separate cup, add cocoa and sugar to taste. Mix well.
4. Add a small amount of the heated milk to the cocoa mixture and whisk until smooth.
5. Using a hand blender or immersion blender, beat the remaining milk until frothy. If using a good aerating blender, you can approximate steamed milk.
6. Gradually add the frothy milk to the chocolate slurry, stirring continuously.
7. Taste and adjust sweetness if needed.
8. Pour into a mug and enjoy immediately.
9. Optionally, stir in a pinch of vanilla extract or a splash of brandy or butterscotch schnapps for added flavor.
